## Why

<!-- What problem does this solve? Link the issue: Closes #XX -->

## How

<!-- Brief description of the approach -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat:` New feature
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation
- [ ] `refactor:` Code refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] `test:` Tests

## Author Type

- [ ] Human contributor
- [ ] AI agent (Codex / Claude Code / Cursor)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project coding standards (see AGENTS.md)
- [ ] Added/updated type hints (Python) or types (TypeScript)
- [ ] Error handling returns structured results (not exceptions)
- [ ] Tested the happy path manually
- [ ] No API keys or secrets in the diff
- [ ] Updated relevant docs if behavior changed

## Agent-Specific (if AI-authored)

- [ ] Referenced the correct issue
- [ ] Changes are focused — no unrelated refactors
- [ ] Followed the tool implementation pattern from AGENTS.md
- [ ] Humans: please review before merging
